title: CEANO RESTAURANT
description: Experience the finest international flavors in a modern Atmosphere. Our menu features a curated selection of gourmet dishes crafted with passion.

products.name: Tenderloin Steak
products.description: Premium tenderloin steak served with grilled vegetables and golden fries. Seasoned with our secret spice blend.

products.name: Ceano Pasta
products.description: Creamy white sauce pasta with grilled chicken and fresh mushrooms, topped with parmesan cheese.

products.name: Grilled Salmon
products.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon grilled to perfection, served with lemon butter sauce and asparagus.

products.name: Sushi Symphony Roll
products.description: Fresh salmon, avocado, and shrimp tempura rolls. A symphony of flavors wrapped in every roll.

products.name: Classic Burger
products.description: Juicy beef patty with fresh lettuce, tomato, onions, and our signature burger sauce in a brioche bun.
